bottlenecks.title: 10 products seeded but 0 live on Gumroad
bottlenecks.description: gumroad_listings.json has products but GUMROAD_ENGINE hasn't run successfully yet.
bottlenecks.fix: Ensure GUMROAD_SECRET is set, then trigger OMNIBRAIN or run GUMROAD_ENGINE manually via RUN_NOW

bottlenecks.title: Gmail App Password may be account password (535 auth error)
bottlenecks.description: Gmail requires an App Password (16 chars) not your account password. 2FA must be ON.
bottlenecks.fix: Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App Passwords → Generate for Mail → paste new value to GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD
bottlenecks.revenue_impact: No email briefings, no payment notifications
